game_name: Prince of Persia 2: The Shadow and the Flame

special_mechanics.name: Shadow Control
special_mechanics.description: Prince can detach and wield his shadow at will to solve puzzles and obtain items like the magic flame

special_mechanics.name: Magic Carpet Riding
special_mechanics.description: Prince can ride a magic carpet for transportation across levels

special_mechanics.name: Magic Horse Riding
special_mechanics.description: Prince can ride a magical horse to traverse areas and return to Persia

special_mechanics.name: Crawling
special_mechanics.description: Character can crawl to navigate tight spaces and avoid traps

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Qualitative data only. Available sources provide gameplay overview but no detailed physics parameters. Game features running, jumping, crawling mechanics typical of early 1990s cinematic platformers. Time limit system (75 minutes real-time) and combat mechanics distinguish it from original. Multiple enemy encounters and level complexity greater than predecessor.
